subcodes.first_line: O ye friends of God! In this moment in the Garden of Ridván We are intimate companions with the other friends, united in fellowship and communion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ياران الهی در اين دم در حديقه رضوان با سائر دوستان مألوفيم و مأنوس معروفيم و محسوس
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
